title: hemionitis brachyptera
intro: Hemionitis brachyptera, commonly known as the fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions. Hemionitis brachyptera has been found to possess several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its therapeutic actions in reducing pain, fever, and inflammation. The bioactive constituents of Hemionitis brachyptera include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.

side_effects: Hemionitis brachyptera can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea, due to its high levels of toxic compounds like thujone and bornyl acetate.
